case_title: ANN DEGIOVANNI VS. GEORGE CHANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,552.50 FILED BY DEGIOVANNI, ANN AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, GEORGE CHANG, JENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-07-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEGIOVANNI, ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, JENNY $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2022 - CONTINUED TO AUG-26-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JENNY CHANG WAS NOT FILED FIVE DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE AS REQUIRED BY CCP 116.340(C). DEFENDANT JENNY CHANG DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED AS TO JENNY CHANG. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON GEORGE CHANG. PLAINTIFF ANN DEGIOVANNI APPEARED. DEFENDANT JENNY CHANG APPEARED, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. DEFENDANT GEORGE CHANG DID NOT APPEAR. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.) SERVED JUL-05-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, JENNY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANG, JENNY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ANN DEGIOVANNI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEORGE CHANG IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JENNY CHANG IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS WILLIAM CHANG (SON AND PROPERTY MANAGER) AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CHINESE MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI (#301135). NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT GEORGE CHANG. PLAINTIFF ANN DEGIVOANNI REQUESTS TO DISMISS DEFENDANT GEORGE CHANG TO MOVE FORWARD WITH TRIAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
